variants: Yuna Hoshimori is a notable figure in the realm of design and technology. She graduated from the Inkwell School of Design, where she honed her creative skills. Currently, Yuna is employed by the Bluefin Robotics Collective, where she works with Burmese characters. In addition to her professional accomplishments, she also serves as a member of the Kindling Arts Guild Council, contributing her expertise to the arts community. Her writing has been featured in the Foxglove Lantern Press, showcasing her ability to blend creativity with her professional background.
